nasb.text: You shall make for it a rim of a handbreadth around it; and you shall make a gold border for the rim around it.

esv.text: And you shall make a rim around it a handbreadth wide, and a molding of gold around the rim.

cnv.text: 你要給桌子的四圍做七十五公釐寬的框邊，框邊上的四圍要做金邊。

ccb.text: 在桌子四周造一个八厘米宽的外框，上面也镶上金边。
